commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 23:4 Of which, twenty and four thousand were to look after the work of the house of the LORD; and six thousand were officers and judges: Overseers. Hebrew shot rim. Septuagint, "scribes. "Others suppose "lictors and executioners "who attended the judges. (Grotius) These were functions from which the priests were exempted; (Calmet) so that the Levites alone are meant. (Menochius) Judges. They had to decide the causes of the people, 2 Paralipomenon xxix.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
